hey dave,
I made some adjustments to the layering, but it requires an engineer to
confirm the accuracy of the data... youll see the next step in jack:

The next step should be an engineer-reviewed, stratified sample across fact
types. That will tell us exactly how much is useful signal versus noise and
establish precision/recall thresholds before candidates can influence
answers.

is this something you could help with?

--

What you need to bring at pickup
Driver's license
Each driver must bring their valid, physical license. No copies or learner’s permits accepted. If any driver's license uses non-Latin characters, that driver must also bring an international driving permit.

Identification for non-US licenses
Each driver with a non-US license must also bring a valid, physical ID or passport.

Payment method
Credit, debit, and digital wallet cards are accepted in the renter's name.

Not accepted: Cash, checks, or prepaid cards.

Paying with a debit card? You'll need a booked return flight, train, or bus ticket in your name, matching your rental return date and booked at least 24 hours before pickup. Not available for sports and luxury cars.

Paying with a digital wallet? Available at selected locations only. Other restrictions may apply.

Seattle has a toll tunnel running beneath downtown and a toll bridge crossing Lake Washington to Bellevue. You're most likely to encounter a toll if you're driving through the city center or heading to the Eastside. Without a toll pass, any resulting fees will be charged to you after your return.

Late returns
If your return is later than expected, update your booking via the app, website, or by calling us. Extra days are charged at the daily rate. If you return late without updating your booking, additional late return fees apply.

Early returns

Travel Protection Policy Document

Dear David Salter: 

Thank you for choosing Generali Global Assistance & Insurance Services for your travel insurance needs. 
As you prepare for your trip, you can be sure we are working hard to give 
you the peace of mind you deserve.

During your trip, emergency assistance is available 24 hours a day by contacting our 
designated service provider within the USA at (866) 922-0278 or 
internationally at (202) 974-6480 (collect calls accepted).

The quoted price for the travel protection plan includes the Travel Insurance premium and a separate fee for non-insurance travel assistance services. You may obtain additional information about the terms and conditions of the Travel Insurance plan by reviewing the Description of Coverage/Policy, and you may obtain information on the pricing of the insurance and assistance services by emailing customerservice@generaliglobalassistance.com. 

Please review your policy documents carefully, and if you have any questions about your plan, please contact our Customer Service Department at (800) 217-8280. 

Your free look period expires on Aug 06, 2026. If you decide to cancel this plan during your free look period and you have not left for your covered trip or filed a claim, simply visit Booking.com: The largest selection of hotels, homes, and vacation rentals to cancel your plan and receive a full refund of your plan cost. 

On the following pages you will find a schedule of benefits. Again, thank you for choosing Generali Global Assistance & Insurance Services to protect you before, during and after your trip. 

In the event that you need to file a claim, please visit our eClaims portal at https://booking-us.eclaims.csaclaims.com/ 

Sincerely, 

CSA Travel Protection

Subject: Fwd: Cancer Center - Structural Observation for Shotcrete Rebar
Gmail message ID: 19f8612923379d47
Thread ID: 19f8612923379d47

Email body:
Luke,

Will you be available for a site visit next Monday to 2022-108? Address is
400 Rolling Oaks Drive Thousand Oaks, CA 91361. This is a T&M construction
support budget.

You will generally be responsible for reviewing the permanent reinforcement
placed for the wall. You will need to get photos of the
reinforcement spacing and lap lengths to confirm conformance to our
design plans.

An example set of photos is provided on PDF pages 2-21 of the SO7
structural observation form I prepared here: *S:\1 - DRS Eng -
Projects\2025\2025-100 Walden Project - Peak Projects\Structural
Observations\20260715*

Let me know your availability and if you have any questions.

Thanks
*Jody Robinson, PE*
*President & Principal*
Jody@DRS-Engineering.net
Office: (818) 402-3962 Ext. 1
Cell: (360) 721-4548

*Los Angeles, Santa Barbara, San Luis Obispo,*
*Vancouver, Grand Rapids*

From: Saumya Joshi 
Date: Tue, Jul 21, 2026 at 11:20 AM
Subject: Cancer Center - Structural Observation for Shotcrete Rebar
To: Jody Robinson 
Cc: Sekiya, Mitchell , Alex Khandan ,
Chase Schoen , Randy Ferguson 

Jody,

We will be doing the Shotcrete for the 10” wall from 7/29 (Wednesday) -
7/31 (Friday) next week.

For your Structural Observation onsite, we think *Monday (7/27)* would be
an appropriate day. That would give us 1 day in between - in case you
identify any fix that needs to be done prior to Shotcrete.

Let us know if this date works for you.

Thank you,

title: Mid-week Club Trips
notes:
Source account: DRS <drs@drs-engineering.net>
Task area: DRS
From: Jim Spencer <jspencer2@yahoo.com>
Date: 2026-07-18 16:18
Subject: Mid-week Club Trips
Gmail message ID: 19f77862cc6f8249
Thread ID: 19f77862cc6f8249

Email body:
Hello, I started this discussion on text, but Brad suggested I add Steve and Dave on as well, so a bit of a repeat for the rest of you, but not exactly, so still read it all. 
I ran into Brad at the Stow concert night. Long story short, I told him I was trying to plan a midweek trip with a retired friend in my other group and since he and Danny are also retired maybe they would like to join. My retired friend messed up his shoulder and probably is out of commission for a while.  But it got me thinking about maybe having midweek trips every month or so for those of the unemployed ranks (Darrel time to retire 😁). Would any of you be available for a BB trip September 15th to 17th?  These would be relaxing mid-level trips with some challenges, but not crazy. A lot of my friends are still working, and thus I can only do things with them on the weekends.  This causes me to miss a lot of the club trips, but generally I'm wide-open mid-week.  Even if these dates don’t work or you'd like to suggest a different place, do you like the concept?  I am happy to be trail boss for the first couple of trips to get things started.  Obviously, every trip would be available to every club member, but I want to make sure there is a core group (that's all of you) that would like to join when you can and are generally available mid-week.
Another advantage is no one has to show up early to get a premium camp spot in the middle of the week!  Less busy, less hassle. 
I will miss the next club meeting, so if everyone likes the idea maybe one of you could announce it at the upcoming meeting.
Thanks,
Jim.

notes:

Subject: Complete Your XPWitness Profile
Gmail message ID: 19f6caf192b52883
Thread ID: 19f6caf192b52883

Email body:
Hi Dr. David R Salter,
I hope you're doing well.
I wanted to reach out because I noticed your XPWitness profile is still incomplete. At the moment, your profile does not include a professional photo, background and bio, resume/CV, company information, title, contact details, experience statistics, or professional links such as your website or LinkedIn profile.
Your XPWitness profile serves as your professional online presence, and the information you provide is what attorneys, clients, and referral sources will see when reviewing your qualifications.
To help your profile make the strongest impression, please consider adding the following:

* Professional headshot
* Resume/CV
* Background and professional bio
* Company name and professional title
* Public phone number and email address
* Experience statistics (Expert Retentions, Expert Reports, Depositions, and Trial Testimonies)
* Website, LinkedIn, and/or YouTube links

The more complete your profile is, the better it can showcase your expertise and professional experience.
If you have any questions or need assistance updating your profile, please don't hesitate to reach out.
Best regards,

[https://245558834.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na2.net/hubfs/245558834/transparent%20(2).png]
XPWitness Support Team
